name: Phoenix Gearfried
name_jp: フェニックス・ギア・フリード
desc:
This card is treated as a Normal Monster while face-up on the field or in the Graveyard. While this card is a Normal Monster on the field, you can Normal Summon it to have it become an Effect Monster with this effect.
● If your opponent activates a Spell Card: You can target 1 Gemini monster in your Graveyard; Special Summon that target. During either player's turn, when a Spell/Trap Card is activated that targets a monster(s) on the field: You can send 1 face-up Equip Card you control to the Graveyard; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy it.

sets.set: Legendary Collection 4: Joey's World Mega Pack

action: Activates if targeted by card effect
Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
mst: Negates the activation of Spell Cards
Negates the activation of Trap Cards
